system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Arm Strike, Melee or Leg Strike (at -1d10) against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 3

You quickly tap three vital meridian points on the target’s chest, causing paralysis. On a Success you paralyze the target for 1 round per Rank of Dianxue. On a Total Success the paralysis lasts one additional round. Against characters without Qi levels, this ability works normally. However for any Martial Heroes (characters with at least one level of Qi) this only works if you attack when the target is surprised. This is a well-known attack and only the most inattentive Martial Heroes fall for it. Cathartic: When used Cathartically, the effect is very powerful, immobilizing the person for one hour per Rank of Dianxue. This can also be used Cathartically to undo the effects of an Inverted Three-Point Strike.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.activationSkill: Arm Strike, Melee or Leg Strike (at -1d10) against Parry
system.targetEffects: Paralyzed for 1 round per Rank of Dianxue
system.totalSuccessTargetEffects: Paralyzed for 1 round per Rank of Dianxue plus 1 additional round
system.catharticTargetEffects: Immobilized for 1 hour per Rank of Dianxue
system.targetEffectsNote: Against Martial Heroes, normal use only works when the target is surprised.
system.catharticEffect: When used Cathartically, the effect is very powerful, immobilizing the person for one hour per Rank of Dianxue. This can also be used Cathartically to undo the effects of an Inverted Three-Point Strike.
